1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and identifiers

2.description: get 200-year storm-surge areas within Kristiansand municipality

4.description: find buildings within 50 metres of storm-surge areas

5.description: calculate distance from each building to the nearest storm-surge area

6.description: keep the shortest distance per building

7.description: sort buildings by shortest distance ascending

9.description: join municipality and county names to the result

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade AS geometry FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT omrade AS geometry FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_MakeEnvelope(ST_XMin(omrade), ST_YMin(omrade), ST_XMax(omrade), ST_YMax(omrade)), 25833), 25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT bygningsnummer, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, representasjonspunkt AS geometry FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "dwithin"
-- left_geom: "geometry"
-- right_geom: "geometry"
-- distance_meters: 50
